Careers
Join a Mentorship-Focused TCM Clinic in Ottawa
Join Our Team at Lotus Care

Are you a passionate Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) practitioner or Student seeking a supportive and empowering environment to transition smoothly from school to clinical practice? At Lotus Care, we offer structured internship and residency programs designed to refine your clinical skills, deepen your hands-on experience, and build confidence in both treatment and clinic operations.

Why Join Lotus Care?

At Lotus Care, we are more than a healthcare provider—we are a community rooted in excellence, mentorship, and the advancement of TCM in Ottawa. We believe in nurturing talent, fostering collaboration, and investing in the future of our profession.

By joining our team, you will:

Receive personalized mentorship from experienced TCM practitioners.
Gain hands-on clinical experience in a warm, collaborative environment.
Build essential administrative and communication skills for successful practice management.
Engage in community outreach to raise awareness of TCM’s benefits.
Participate in ongoing professional development and structured training.
Who We’re Looking For

We welcome committed and enthusiastic individuals who:

Are newly registered acupuncturists or current TCM students.
Are passionate about raising the standard of TCM care in Ottawa.
Align with our value
